title: Unsupervised Learning Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the core process and common algorithms of unsupervised learning, where an algorithm learns patterns from unlabeled data.
elements: Unsupervised Learning Algorithm (e.g., Clustering, Dimensionality Reduction)
relationships: Data is processed for features, which are fed into an algorithm to produce an output model, which is then interpreted for insights or used in downstream tasks
